column1: HERA = Housing and Economic Recovery Act. LIHTC = low-income housing tax credit. PIS = LIHTC properties placed in service database.

Note:  In previous versions of this table, if a head of household was not identified, the race/ethnicity was reported for the oldest tenant. If more than one head was reported, the oldest member was included in these tabulations. This version only includes household members that are reported as the head of household. If multiple heads are reported, all are included.  Hawaii, Massachusetts, Northern Marianas Islands and New York reported no heads of household for 3%,2%, 12% and 7% of occupied units, respectively. Kentucky, Ohio and Tennessee reported more than one head of household for 17%, 30% and 15% of occupied units, respectively.  All other states reported exactly one head of household per unit for over 99% of occupied units.
